top_signals.title: SK Hynix hits $1 trillion valuation as AI boom lifts South Korean chip stocks
top_signals.summary: Shares of SK Hynix soared over 11% on Wednesday, pushing the South Korean memory-chip maker above the $1 trillion market capitalization mark.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
